description: Five speakers discuss an all-hands meeting where two explicitly decline due to travel conflicts; attendees list must reflect only confirmed attendees.

events.title: All-Hands Meeting
events.reasoning: Alice announces the all-hands for Monday at 10 AM. Bob and Carol confirm attendance. Dave and Eve both decline due to travel. Alice confirms attendees are herself, Bob, and Carol. Duration is 2 hours in the main auditorium.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: all-hands meeting on Monday at 10 AM. Dave and Eve are absent due to travel.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23. Dave and Eve explicitly decline; they should not appear in attendees.
